passiveAbilities.name: Slow
passiveAbilities.description: This model's jog actions are limited to 2".

passiveAbilities.name: Dirk
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Shoot Crossbow]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while this model is engaged.

activeAbilities.name: Brothers in Arms
activeAbilities.description: Target other friendly Militia gains +1 Arcane stat and +2 Melee stat until end of turn. Then, the target may discard 1 energy to give this character +1 Arcane stat and +2 Melee stat until end of turn. TYou may only target each characters once per turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shoot Crossbow
arcaneAbilities.description:
[G]X: Target suffers 2X piercing Dmg then is moved 1" directly away. 
Catastrophe: The Reload ability cannot be used for the remainder of the game.
